Doctor.title: Doctor
Doctor.description: Represents a doctor or administrator with access to the system.

email.description: The email address of the doctor.

role.description: The role of the user (admin or doctor).

Patient.title: Patient
Patient.description: Represents a medical patient in the system.

full_name.description: The full name of the patient.

phone_number.description: The phone number of the patient.

address.description: The residential address of the patient.

medical_history.description: A summary of the patient's medical history.

is_favorite.description: Flag indicating if the patient is marked as a favorite.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the patient was registered.

last_visit_date.description: The timestamp of the patient's last visit.

created_by.description: The email of the doctor who registered the patient.

history_images.description: URLs to images related to the patient's medical history.

Visit.title: Visit
Visit.description: Represents a specific medical visit for a patient.

diagnosis.description: The diagnosis or reason for the visit.

notes.description: Detailed clinical notes from the visit.

clinical_images.description: URLs to clinical images taken during the visit.

lab_images.description: URLs to lab result images provided during the visit.

audio_records.description: URLs to audio recordings taken during the visit.

note_images.description: URLs to images of physical notes.

next_followup_date.description: The date for the next follow-up visit.

created_by.description: The email of the doctor who recorded the visit.

/doctors/{email}.description: Collection of authorized doctors and administrators.

/patients/{patientId}/visits/{visitId}.description: Subcollection of visits for a specific patient.
